oldOnlyExamples.summary: The 'Factory selection' step must occur before 'Buyer's Approval' can be obtained.
Following a 'Meeting w Buyer / Trendboards', a 'Design Request Format' is initiated.
A 'Call/email from the buyer' leads to the creation of a 'Design Request Format'.
After an 'Agenda template/ Kick off Meeting', the Creative direction team creates a card for 'Style guides - input for designers'.
oldOnlyExamples.quote: [Rectangle: "Agenda template/ Kick off Meeting"] --> [Rectangle: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"]

oldOnlyExamples.summary: A 'Design Request Format' leads to 'Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size' by the Creative direction team.
oldOnlyExamples.quote: [Rectangle: "Design Request Format"] --> [Rectangle: "Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size"]

oldOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size', a 'Brief' is created by the Creative direction team.
A 'Brief' is followed by a 'Debriefing' by the Creative direction team.
After 'Debriefing', 'Design in Progress' is initiated by Creative designers.
'Costing sheets approval' by Creative direction leads to 'Costing sheets elaboration' by Technical designers.
'Costing sheets approval' by Creative direction also leads to 'Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration' by Creative designers.
After 'Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration' by Creative designers, the next step is to 'Upload to DFlow RFQ code'.
oldOnlyExamples.quote: [Rectangle: "Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration"] --> [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"]

oldOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Upload to DFlow RFQ code', 'RFQ to Factories' is sent by Sourcing.
oldOnlyExamples.quote: [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"] --> [Rectangle: "RFQ to Factories"]

oldOnlyExamples.summary: After 'RFQ to Factories' is sent, 'Details and Limitations' are provided by the Factories.
After 'Details and Limitations' are provided by Factories, Sourcing proceeds to 'Asking the factories about limitations'.
oldOnlyExamples.quote: [Rectangle: "Details and Limitations"] --> [Rectangle: "Asking the factories about limitations"]

oldOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Asking the factories about limitations', Sourcing must 'Provide details in Click Up'.
oldOnlyExamples.quote: [Rectangle: "Asking the factories about limitations"] --> [Rectangle: "Provide details in Click Up"]

oldOnlyExamples.summary: After the 'Price' is established, Carlos is responsible for 'SKUs creation (DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, ClickUp)'.
After 'Create card: Style guides - input for designers', Creative designers perform 'Assets/ compositions selection'.
oldOnlyExamples.quote: [Rectangle: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"] --> [Rectangle: "Assets/ compositions selection"]

oldOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Assets/ compositions selection', Creative designers perform 'Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration'.
After preparing 'Art files in the right format + Packaging', Technical designers perform 'Tech Packing'.
oldOnlyExamples.quote: [Rectangle: "Art files in the right format + Packaging"] --> [Rectangle: "Tech Packing"]

oldOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Tech Packing', 'Tech Pack Approval' is required by Creative direction.
After 'Tech Pack Approval', 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization' is required by Creative direction.
After 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization', the 'Licensor's comment' is received by Creative direction.
After a 'Tech Pack Update', the process returns to 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization'.
After 'Revisions implementation', the process returns to 'Design in Progress'.
After 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization', the Licensing Team performs 'Concept Submit to Licensor'.
oldOnlyExamples.quote: [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Submit Authorization"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept Submit to Licensor"]

oldOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Concept Submit to Licensor', the Licensor may request 'Concept Revisions'.
After 'Concept Revisions', the Licensing Team must 'Resubmit' the concept.
After 'Resubmit', the concept goes back to 'Concept Submit to Licensor'.
After 'Concept Revisions', the Licensor may provide 'Concept Approved w comments'.
After 'Concept Approved w comments' from the Licensor, the Licensing Team performs 'Comments approval'.

newOnlyExamples.summary: The Sales team's 'Agenda template/Kick off Meeting' is a prerequisite for the Creative Direction team to 'Create card: Style guides - input for designers'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Agenda template/ Kick off Meeting"] --> [White Box: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: Following a 'Meeting w Buyer / Trendboards', the Sales team initiates a 'Design Request Format'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Meeting w Buyer / Trendboards"] --> [White Box: "Design Request Format"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: A 'Call/email from the buyer' triggers the Sales team to create a 'Design Request Format'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Call/email from the buyer"] --> [White Box: "Design Request Format"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: The 'Design Request Format' from Sales leads to the Creative Direction team's 'Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size' stage.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Design Request Format"] --> [White Box: "Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: The Creative Direction team's 'Create card: Style guides - input for designers' step is followed by the Creative Designers' 'Assets/compositions selection'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"] --> [White Box: "Assets/ compositions selection"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size', the Creative Direction team proceeds to 'Brief'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size"] --> [White Box: "Brief"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: The 'Brief' stage is followed by 'Debriefing' within the Creative Direction team.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Brief"] --> [White Box: "Debriefing"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Debriefing', the Creative Direction team moves to 'Costing sheets approval'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Debriefing"] --> [White Box: "Costing sheets approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: The 'Costing sheets approval' step by Creative Direction leads to 'Costing sheets elaboration' by Technical Designers.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Costing sheets approval"] --> [White Box: "Costing sheets elaboration"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Costing sheets approval', the Creative Direction team proceeds to 'Designs Approval'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Costing sheets approval"] --> [White Box: "Designs Approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Upload to DFlow RFQ code', the Sourcing team sends an 'RFQ to Factories'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"] --> [White Box: "RFQ to Factories"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After sending an 'RFQ to Factories', the Factories provide 'Details and Limitations'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "RFQ to Factories"] --> [White Box: "Details and Limitations"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: The Sourcing team's 'Asking the factories about limitations' step is followed by 'Provide details in Click Up'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Asking the factories about limitations"] --> [White Box: "Provide details in Click Up"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Provide details in Click Up', the Factories provide a 'Price'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Provide details in Click Up"] --> [White Box: "Price"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: If Sales confirms the buyer approves the 'Price', the process moves to 'Designs Approval' by Creative Direction.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Price"] --(Arrow: "If Sales confirms buyer approves the Price")--> [White Box: "Designs Approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Designs Approval' by Creative Direction, the Creative Designers begin 'Design in Progress'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Designs Approval"] --> [White Box: "Design in Progress"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Art files in the right format + Packaging' are prepared by Creative Designers, Technical Designers perform 'Tech Packing'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Art files in the right format + Packaging"] --> [White Box: "Tech Packing"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Tech Packing' by Technical Designers, the next step is 'Tech Pack Approval'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Tech Packing"] --> [White Box: "Tech Pack Approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Tech Pack Approval', the Creative Direction team provides 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Tech Pack Approval"] --> [White Box: "Tech Pack Submit Authorization"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization' by Creative Direction, the Licensor provides 'Licensor's comment'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Tech Pack Submit Authorization"] --> [White Box: "Licensor's comment"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After a 'Tech Pack Update' by Technical Designers, the Creative Direction team provides 'Tech Pack Submit Authorization' again.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Tech Pack Update"] --> [White Box: "Tech Pack Submit Authorization"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Revisions implementation' by Creative Designers, the process loops back to 'Designs Approval' by Creative Direction.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Revisions implementation"] --> [White Box: "Designs Approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Buyer's Approval', the Sales team sends 'Picks confirmation to PM'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Buyer's Approval"] --> [White Box: "Picks confirmation to PM"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Picks confirmation to PM' from Sales, the next step is a 'Sample request'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Picks confirmation to PM"] --> [White Box: "Sample request"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After a 'Sample request' from Sales, Junior Designers prepare 'Files for Factory: Art Files + Mock ups+ Packaging + Legal'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Sample request"] --> [White Box: "Files for Factory: Art Files + Mock ups+ Packaging + Legal"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Junior Designers prepare 'Files for Factory: Art Files + Mock ups+ Packaging + Legal', they proceed to 'PPS Audit'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Files for Factory: Art Files + Mock ups+ Packaging + Legal"] --> [White Box: "PPS Audit"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'PPS Audit' by Junior Designers, Gina 'Review Audit and send to factory'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "PPS Audit"] --> [White Box: "Review Audit and send to factory"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Carlos creates a 'Concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp', the Production team handles 'Samples shipped to US'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp"] --> [White Box: "Samples shipped to US"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Samples shipped to US', the Buyer provides 'Samples Buyer's approval'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Samples shipped to US"] --> [White Box: "Samples Buyer's approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Factory selection' by Albert, the Buyer provides 'Samples Buyer's approval'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Factory selection"] --> [White Box: "Samples Buyer's approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After the Licensing Team performs 'Concept Submit to Licensor', the Licensor provides 'Concept Revisions'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Concept Submit to Licensor"] --> [White Box: "Concept Revisions"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Concept Revisions' from the Licensor, the Licensing Team performs a 'Resubmit'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Concept Revisions"] --> [White Box: "Resubmit"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After a 'Resubmit' by the Licensing Team, the process loops back to 'Concept Submit to Licensor'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Resubmit"] --> [White Box: "Concept Submit to Licensor"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After the Licensor provides 'Concept Approved w comments', the Licensing Team performs 'Comments approval'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Concept Approved w comments"] --> [White Box: "Comments approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Comments approval' by the Licensing Team, the Licensor provides 'Concept Approved'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Comments approval"] --> [White Box: "Concept Approved"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Concept Approved' by the Licensor, Carlos creates a 'Concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Concept Approved"] --> [White Box: "Concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Samples Internal Approval' by Creative Direction, Junior Designers perform a 'PPS Audit'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Samples Internal Approval"] --> [White Box: "PPS Audit"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After 'Professional Photos Approval' by Junior Designers, the Production team takes 'Professional Photos'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Professional Photos Approval"] --> [White Box: "Professional Photos"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After the Production team takes 'Professional Photos', Carlos handles 'Ship to US'.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Professional Photos"] --> [White Box: "Ship to US"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: Design approval proceeds only if Sales confirms the buyer approves the price.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Price"] --(Arrow: "If Sales confirms buyer approves the Price")--> [White Box: "Designs Approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: Creative Direction's design approval is dependent on Sales confirming the buyer approves the price.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Price"] --(Arrow: "If Sales confirms buyer approves the Price")--> [White Box: "Designs Approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: Creative Direction's design approval is dependent on Sales confirming the buyer approves the price.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Price"] --(Arrow: "If Sales confirms buyer approves the Price")--> [White Box: "Designs Approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: If the audit passes, the PPS is submitted to the licensor.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Review Audit and send to factory"] --(Arrow: "If Audit: Pass")--> [White Box: "PPS Submit to licensor"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After a meeting is scheduled with a buyer, the Sales team must create an agenda template for a kick-off meeting.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Meeting Scheduled"] --> [White Box: "Agenda template/ Kick off Meeting"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After a meeting with a buyer or trendboards, the Sales team must create a design request format.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Meeting w Buyer / Trendboards"] --> [White Box: "Design Request Format"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: A call or email from the buyer triggers the Sales team to create a design request format.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Call/email from the buyer"] --> [White Box: "Design Request Format"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After the Sales team creates an agenda template for a kick-off meeting, Creative Direction must create a card for style guides as input for designers.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Agenda template/ Kick off Meeting"] --> [White Box: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After the Sales team creates a design request format, Creative Direction must provide pre-brief design notes and confirm the size.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Design Request Format"] --> [White Box: "Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Creative Direction creates a card for style guides, Creative Designers must select assets and compositions.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"] --> [White Box: "Assets/ compositions selection"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Creative Direction provides pre-brief design notes and confirms the size, they must create a brief.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size"] --> [White Box: "Brief"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Creative Direction creates a brief, they must conduct a debriefing.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Brief"] --> [White Box: "Debriefing"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Creative Direction conducts a debriefing, they must approve costing sheets.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Debriefing"] --> [White Box: "Costing sheets approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Creative Direction approves costing sheets, Technical Designers must elaborate on the costing sheets.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Costing sheets approval"] --> [White Box: "Costing sheets elaboration"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Creative Direction approves costing sheets, they must also approve designs.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Costing sheets approval"] --> [White Box: "Designs Approval"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Technical Designers elaborate on costing sheets, they must upload them to DFlow with an RFQ code.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Costing sheets elaboration"] --> [White Box: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Technical Designers upload costing sheets to DFlow with an RFQ code, Sourcing must send an RFQ to factories.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"] --> [White Box: "RFQ to Factories"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Sourcing sends an RFQ to factories, the factories must provide details and limitations.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "RFQ to Factories"] --> [White Box: "Details and Limitations"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Sourcing asks factories about limitations, they must provide details in ClickUp.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Asking the factories about limitations"] --> [White Box: "Provide details in Click Up"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: After Sourcing provides details in ClickUp, factories must provide a price.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Provide details in Click Up"] --> [White Box: "Price"]

newOnlyExamples.summary: If Sales confirms the buyer approves the price, Creative Direction must approve the designs.
newOnlyExamples.quote: [White Box: "Price"] --(Arrow: "If Sales confirms buyer approves the Price")--> [White Box: "Designs Approval"]
